name: vtsSerialSetOnSendHandler
title: vtsSerialSetOnSendHandler
description: Sets the callback that notifies when a send operation on the serial port of the specified channel is completed successfully.
The set callback must have following signature: void <OnSerialSend>( byte sendBuffer[], dword number)

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Name of the system variable/namespace that will be affected by this function call.
